reasons.ar: انشغال الموظف بجهاز الكاشير وعدم الانتباه لوصول الضيف
reasons.en: Focused on the POS and did not notice the guest arrival

reasons.ar: عدم وجود تواصل بصري أو ابتسامة
reasons.en: No eye contact or smile

reasons.ar: لغة جسد ضعيفة (وقفة غير احترافية / بدون طاقة)
reasons.en: Weak body language (unprofessional posture / low energy)

reasons.ar: عدم استخدام تحية مناسبة أو استخدام تحية بشكل آلي
reasons.en: Did not use a proper greeting or used it in a robotic way

reasons.ar: الضغط أو الزحمة تؤثر على سلوك الموظف
reasons.en: Pressure or rush affected the employee’s behavior

reasons.ar: استخدام كلمات قصيرة وجافة (مثل: نعم / انتظر)
reasons.en: Used short and dry responses (e.g., yes / wait)

reasons.ar: عدم محاولة بناء تواصل أو علاقة مع الضيف
reasons.en: Did not attempt to build rapport with the guest

reasons.ar: نبرة صوت غير ودودة أو بدون حماس
reasons.en: Unfriendly or low-energy tone of voice
Lack of confidence while speaking

reasons.ar: عدم التعامل الجيد مع اختلاف اللغة
reasons.en: Did not handle language differences effectively

reasons.ar: التركيز على المهام أكثر من الضيف (تنظيف، حديث جانبي…)
reasons.en: Focused on tasks more than the guest (cleaning, side conversations, etc.)

reasons.ar: عدم فهم رحلة الضيف داخل المطعم
reasons.en: Does not understand the guest journey inside the restaurant
Lack of training on prioritization
Does not take ownership of the guest experience
Interrupted the guest while speaking
Lack of focus (easily distracted)
Misunderstood due to rushing
Did not confirm the order or information
Lack of patience while listening
Rushed while taking the order
Did not repeat the order for confirmation

reasons.ar: أخطاء في إدخال الطلب على النظام
reasons.en: Incorrect order entry in the system
Lost focus during peak times
Poor communication
Poor coordination between stations
Team not ready or poorly organized
Slow response time
Lack of speed mindset

reasons.ar: وجود اختناقات في المطبخ أو الخدمة
reasons.en: Bottlenecks in kitchen or service flow
Mood affects performance
Low energy level
Does not understand hospitality culture
Did not follow up with the guest

reasons.ar: عدم معرفة خطوات التعامل مع الشكوى (استمع – اعتذر – حل)
reasons.en: Does not know complaint handling steps (Listen – Apologize – Solve)

reasons.ar: الخوف من التعامل مع ضيف غاضب
reasons.en: Afraid to deal with an upset guest
Took a defensive attitude
Delayed resolving the issue

reasons.ar: عدم معرفة متى يجب ابلاغ المدير
reasons.en: Did not know when to involve the manager
Did not properly thank or say goodbye to the guest
Guest left without any interaction
Employee immediately shifted to another task

reasons.ar: عدم وجود تواصل بصري عند المغادرة
reasons.en: No eye contact when the guest left
Does not understand the importance of the last impression
Inconsistent service quality
Did not attempt to exceed guest expectations

reasons.ar: عدم تخصيص الخدمة (لا يتم الاهتمام باحتياجات الضيف الخاصة)
reasons.en: Service not personalized (guest needs not considered)
Ignored returning guests

text.en: Verified to work independently at the station
